title: canarium odontophyllum f. multifidum
intro: Canarium odontophyllum f. multifidum is a plant species also known as the Borneo ironwood or pokok merawan, native to the tropical forests of Borneo. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing due to its high tannin content. The health benefits of Canarium odontophyllum f. multifidum include its antimicrobial properties, which can help prevent infections and its antioxidant properties, which can protect against cell damage and promote overall well-being. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a decoction or infusion, and its extracts are used in herbal preparations, such as tinctures and ointments, to harness its medicinal properties.
